# Swap misplaced non-voter: 6 stores in 2 zones, constraint requires 3
# replicas in zone=b. 3 voters in zone=a, 1 non-voter in zone=a, 1 non-voter
# in zone=b. Only 1 of the required 3 replicas are in zone=b. MMA should swap
# the misplaced non-voter.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=5 node-id=5 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=6 node-id=6 locality-tiers=zone=b
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=4 type=NON_VOTER
    store-id=5 type=NON_VOTER
    config=num_replicas=5 num_voters=3 constraints={'+zone=b':2}
----

repair-needed
----
SwapNonVoterForConstraints: r1

# Repair swaps: removes non-voter on s4 (zone=a) and adds non-voter on s6
# (zone=b).
repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=1] applying replica change r1 type: AddReplica target store n6,s6 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER) to range 1 on store 6
[mmaid=1] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=1, range_id=1, change=r1 type: AddReplica target store n6,s6 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER)
[mmaid=1] applying replica change r1 type: RemoveReplica target store n4,s4 (replica-id=4 type=NON_VOTER)->(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL) to range 1 on store 4
[mmaid=1] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=2, range_id=1, change=r1 type: RemoveReplica target store n4,s4 (replica-id=4 type=NON_VOTER)->(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
[mmaid=1] result(success): SwapNonVoterForConstraints repair for r1, removing non-voter on s4, adding non-voter on s6
pending(2)
change-id=1 store-id=6 node-id=6 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER)
change-id=2 store-id=4 node-id=4 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=4 type=NON_VOTER)
  next=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)

# Pending change suppresses further repair.
repair-needed
----
RepairPending: r1

# Confirm the swap: leaseholder reports s6 instead of s4.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=5 type=NON_VOTER
    store-id=6 type=NON_VOTER
    config=num_replicas=5 num_voters=3 constraints={'+zone=b':2}
----

# After swap enacted, range is healthy.
repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair
